what: AI wrapper mobile app crossed 50k downloads and surpassed previous salary in revenue
why_us: Shows demand for simple AI wrappers that solve user problems quickly; potential for RHR to build similar monetizable tools

what: Kling AI wrapper generated nearly $7,000 in revenue over a few months
why_us: Concrete revenue from AI video wrapper; highlights opportunity in AI tool wrappers for creative tasks

what: AI therapist app (GPT wrapper) reached $100k MRR, marketed via TikTok
why_us: High revenue example of personalized AI app; pain in traditional therapy pricing creates demand gap

what: Habit Pixel habit tracker app reached $1k MRR in 8 months as solo dev
why_us: Realistic bootstrapped revenue journey; insights into user acquisition and retention for consumer apps

what: Complaints about building alternatives to big SaaS, pain in integrations and plumbing after AI MVP
why_us: Identifies friction points post-AI coding; opportunity for RHR automation tools

what: AI agents for enterprise custom workflows solving specific pains better than generic SaaS
why_us: Shift from generic to custom agents; aligns with bot/automation category
